phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿podría indicarme dónde está el andén dos?
phrases.pronunciation: Dees-KOOL-peh, poh-DREE-ah een-dee-KAR-meh DON-deh eh-STAH el ahn-DEN dos?

likely_response.local: Siga recto, luego baje las escaleras mecánicas.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-gah REHTH-toh loo-EH-goh BAH-heh LAHS eh-skah-LEH-rahs MEHKÁ-nee-kahs
likely_response.translation_en: Go straight, then go down the escalators.

responses.english: Go straight, then go down the escalators.
responses.phonetic: SEE-gah REHTH-toh loo-EH-goh BAH-heh LAHS eh-skah-LEH-rahs MEHKÁ-nee-kahs
responses.french: Siga recto, luego baje las escaleras mecánicas.

phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿hay consigna de equipaje en la estación?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, eye kohn-SEEN-yah deh eh-kee-PAH-heh en lah es-tah-SYOHN?

likely_response.local: En el vestíbulo principal, junto a la salida.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN EHL beh-STÍ-boo-loh preen-thee-PAHL HOON-toh AH LAH sah-LEE-dah
likely_response.translation_en: In the main lobby, next to the exit.

responses.english: In the main lobby, next to the exit.
responses.phonetic: EHN EHL beh-STÍ-boo-loh preen-thee-PAHL HOON-toh AH LAH sah-LEE-dah
responses.french: En el vestíbulo principal, junto a la salida.

phrases.intent_en: Ask when the next train to Jerez leaves
phrases.text_local: Perdone, ¿a qué hora sale el próximo tren a Jerez?
phrases.pronunciation: pehr-DOH-neh, ah keh OH-rah SAH-leh el PROHK-see-moh tren ah heh-REHS?

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated on the departure board.

responses.english: It is indicated on the departure board.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ticket counter is
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-as, DON-deh es-TAH lah tah-KEE-yah?

likely_response.local: Junto a la entrada principal, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: At the back of the lobby, on the left.

responses.english: At the back of the lobby, on the left.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.french: Junto a la entrada principal, a la izquierda.
